content: The system is self-hosting: the first dry-run processed pairs that were created during the same conversation where the system was designed. Pairs 13-18 (where the evaluator was designed and built) were processed by the system that those same pairs describe. This validates the self-hosting property of the intent pipeline.

provenance.raw_agent: The session grew. The conversation continued while we were building — pairs 13-18 are the pairs where we designed and built the evaluator itself. The system ran on pairs that didn't exist when the system was designed. That's the self-hosting property working as intended.
